profile.channel_mismatch_note: HQ Findlay OH — outside WWT STOLA territory. Primary technology decisions likely made in Findlay OH. Channel mismatch flag applied.

signals.signal_title: MPLX data center campus partnership with MARA Holdings — West Texas AI power infrastructure 2025
signals.signal_description: MPLX LP (Marathon’s midstream MLP) signed a partnership with MARA Holdings in 2025 for AI data center power infrastructure in West Texas. Pivoting midstream assets toward AI compute power confirms board-level digital infrastructure investment.

signals.signal_title: Imubit reinforcement learning deployed for Marathon refinery process optimization
signals.signal_description: Marathon Petroleum deployed Imubit’s reinforcement learning AI platform for real-time refinery process optimization. Confirms active AI deployment in core operations beyond pilot stage.

signals.signal_title: Flyscan aerial AI leak detection deployed operationally at Marathon Petroleum
signals.signal_description: Marathon Petroleum deployed Flyscan aerial AI-enabled leak detection operationally across field assets. Confirms AI deployment in OT/field operations.

enrichment_notes: FY2024 revenue $135.95B — highly commodity-exposed refining. 16,738 employees. Azure confirmed as cloud platform. Microsoft 365 in use. SAP ERP backbone. No incumbent MSP. Channel mismatch: Findlay OH outside STOLA. MPLX AI data center power pivot (West Texas, MARA Holdings 2025) is major emerging signal. Imubit reinforcement learning in production. ai_maturity_score=13 (below ≥15 threshold).
